message:
feat(abi): add 33 Tier 2 symbols — 64-bit LFS, preadv/pwritev, mremap, arc4random

Broad expansion across multiple categories:
- I/O: preadv, pwritev, preadv2, pwritev2 (RawSyscall)
- Memory: mremap (RawSyscall)
- Scheduler: sched_getaffinity, sched_setaffinity (RawSyscall)
- Random: getentropy, arc4random, arc4random_buf, arc4random_uniform (Implemented via SYS_getrandom)
- 64-bit LFS variants (GlibcCallThrough): open64, creat64, stat64, fstat64,
  lstat64, fstatat64, lseek64, truncate64, ftruncate64, pread64, pwrite64,
  mmap64, sendfile64, fopen64, freopen64, tmpfile64, fseeko64, ftello64,
  fgetpos64, fsetpos64, readdir64, scandir64

Totals: 679 exported (387 Implemented, 183 RawSyscall, 109 GlibcCallThrough)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
